personalInfo.name: Hrishabh Tripathi
personalInfo.title: Azure Data Engineer | ETL/ELT Developer
personalInfo.summary: Certified Azure Data Engineer with 3+ years of expertise in building scalable data pipelines, ETL processes, and cloud-based analytics solutions using Azure Data Factory, Databricks, and Synapse Analytics. Proven track record of optimizing data workflows and achieving 25% performance improvements.

description: Implemented Azure Data Factory for ETL processes, orchestrating data workflows across Azure services and on-premises sources
Achieved 25% improvement in system performance by optimizing Azure Data Factory workflows and Azure Databricks processes
Managed Azure Cloud Services infrastructure, provisioning virtual machines, storage accounts, and networking components
Integrated Azure Databricks for high-performance data processing and analytics, enhancing ETL pipeline scalability
Utilized Azure Monitor for proactive application health monitoring and performance metrics tracking
Built automated data pipelines using Azure Data Factory with Azure Data Lake Gen2 and Azure SQL Database integration

projects.title: Azure Data Factory for Data Engineers - Covid19 project
projects.description: Built and managed automated data pipelines using Azure Data Factory (ADF) to ingest, transform, and load COVID-19 data from external APIs and Azure Blob Storage into Azure Data Lake Gen2 and Azure SQL Database.

certificates.name: AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate
certificates.file: AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate certificate.pdf

achievements.title: FY24 Q4 Champs Award
achievements.description: Received from DXC Technology Pvt Ltd for being one of the top performers
